title: § On top of mind
html:
Actively reading at the moment

7 Habits of Highly Effective People Read this out of curisoty, I wonder what makes it become a so of a classic.

Simmering ideas

(Stuffs that I kept back in my head pop up time to time.)

What will I tell my 20s

Software engineering advices

Project Management The science and art of managing project and leading people. My recent read on the subject are The Unofficial Project Manager, and The Mythical Man-Month (Book)

Tools for Thought

Networked/structured writing versus Zettelkasten, prose-oriented writing. Which one is the best?

The first network/structured style make things easier to program against, to automate, to analyse. While the latter seems promote more conrete thinking.

backlinks.title: About these notes
backlinks.context: ...discovering through the connections would actually entertain you better. § On top of mind along with the above links can be looked at first as the panning out points.
